marvel-universe.name: Marvel Universe
marvel-universe.description: The shared continuity where most stories published by Marvel Comics take place, including Earth-616 and alternate realities such as the Ultimate Universe.

dc-universe.name: DC Universe
dc-universe.description: The shared continuity where most stories published by DC Comics take place.

invincible-universe.name: Invincible Universe
invincible-universe.description: The continuity of the Invincible series, created by Robert Kirkman and published by Image Comics, independent from the rest of the publisher's catalog.

spawn-universe.name: Spawn Universe
spawn-universe.description: The continuity of the Spawn series, created by Todd McFarlane and published by Image Comics, independent from the rest of the publisher's catalog.

tex-universe.name: Tex Universe
tex-universe.description: The fictional Old West continuity where the Tex Willer stories take place, published by Sergio Bonelli Editore since 1948.
